name: @vance-addon/slideshow
description: Client surface of the Slideshow Brain addon — TypeScript DTOs (generated from Java), REST helpers and the Vue editor component. Self-contained: source consumed by Vite at runtime (main → src/), pre-built .vue.d.ts emitted by vue-tsc for downstream type checking (types → dist/). In production, dist/ also contains the federation remoteEntry.js for loader.path-style dynamic injection at runtime.
